modal.exit.title: Exit the game?
start.title: Choose a world
start.subtitle: Arrow keys: navigate | Enter: world map | Esc: back
settings.title: Settings
settings.hint: Up/Down: select | Left/Right: volume | Enter/Click: change key | Esc: back
win.detail_next: Enter: Next level | Esc: world map
win.detail_done: Enter: Back to world map | Esc: world map
lose.title: You lost!
lose.cancel: Esc: Cancel and go to world map
about.title: About
about.blurb: Made proudly by Frieder Reinhold with Rust and Bevy.
worldmap.no_selection_hint: Arrow/click: choose planet | Enter: start | Esc: worlds
worldmap.label_format: World: {world} | Planet: {planet} {level_info} | Enter: Start | Esc: Worlds
pause.title: Game paused
pause.hint: Arrow/mouse: select | Enter: confirm | Esc: close
game.overlay_hint: Press O to toggle overlay | Press L to toggle hitboxes | Press Esc for pause menu
